name: Grilled Salmon
recipeInstructions:
1. Place salmon on a well-greased broiler pan.
2. Combine olive oil, garlic, parsley, dill weed, and salt in a blender container. Blend until smooth.
3. Stir the blended mixture into the bread crumbs.
4. Brush each salmon steak with butter.
5. Broil the steaks about 4 inches from the heat for 8 minutes, or until the fish flakes easily when tested with a fork.
6. Spread about 2 tablespoons of the garlic mixture on each salmon steak.
7. Return the steaks to the broiler and broil an additional 1-2 minutes, or until lightly browned.
